creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Sergei,

I'm preparing a reset maintainer commit for linpct@gmail.com
When done I will commit this PR as you taking maintainership.

Until then please take a look at https://portscout.freebsd.org/linpct@gmail.com.html to see if you are willing to take maintainership on any of those ports.

Cheers
